commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

commit.message:
chore: remove unnecessary React imports (React 19 prep) (#468)

Remove `import React from 'react'` from 43 files that don't use
`React.` namespace (no React.memo, React.lazy, etc.). The new JSX
transform (`"jsx": "react-jsx"` in tsconfig) handles JSX compilation
without needing React in scope.

This is Phase 1 of React 19 preparation. Audit results:
- No ReactDOM.render/hydrate (already using createRoot)
- No useRef() without arguments
- No defaultProps on function components
- No forwardRef usage
- No string refs
- startTransition used only in notebook/useNotes.ts (compatible)
- 18 MFE vite.config.ts files have requiredVersion: '^18.2.0'
  (must be updated atomically in Phase 3)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

simplify: dedup DISCLOSURE_COLS, extract cache helper, vectorize parquet writes

extract_disclosures.py:
- Extract DISCLOSURE_COLS as module-level constant (was defined twice at
  lines 192 and 276)

extract_seibro_repricing.py:
- Add _fetch_or_load_cache() helper — replaces ~20-line duplicated
  if/elif/else cache load-or-fetch-and-save blocks for repricing and
  exercises (each block was identical except for the fetch function called)
- Replace per-row df.at[] updates with bulk df.loc[] column assignment —
  collect (idx → json_str) dicts first, then two bulk writes instead of
  2×N individual cell writes
- Simplify "empty array" filter from json.loads(x) == [] to x == "[]" —
  avoids parsing JSON on every row when most data is already enriched

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
improve(ajarkan): word-based filter matching for category search

Previously the filter used exact substring matching, so queries like
"boleh bohong gak" failed because no question contained that exact phrase.

Now splits query into words and matches any word (min 2 chars) against
question texts. Results sorted by number of matching words (most relevant
first). "bohong" now matches "Bolehkah berbohong untuk kebaikan?"

fix: 修正全站前後端欄位不一致 + 編輯預約驗證錯誤

1. UpdateBookingRequest：@Future → @FutureOrPresent
   修正編輯今天的預約被拒絕的問題

2. customer-detail.html：
   - b.totalPrice → b.price（金額永遠顯示 $0）
   - completedBookings/cancelledBookings 改從 booking API 計算
     （CustomerResponse 無此欄位，永遠顯示 0）

3. admin/point-topups.html：
   - topup.tenantCode → tenantId 前 8 碼
   - topup.rate → 從 points/amount 計算
   - topup.paymentInfo → paymentMethod + paymentAccount
   - topup.remark → requestNote

4. admin/tenant-detail.html：t.remark → t.requestNote

5. tenant/points.html：
   t.points||t.amount → t.amount??0（|| 在 amount=0 時會跳過）
   t.balance||t.balanceAfter → t.balanceAfter??0

6. tenant/reports.html：移除 bookingsChange/revenueChange 死碼

commit.message:
Standardize CLI boolean flags to --flag / --no-flag paradigm (#13)

* Standardize CLI boolean flags to --flag / --no-flag paradigm (#13)

- Boolean flags drop the `0|1` argument: `--dry-run`, `--clean-build-dir`,
  `--print-config`, `--write-steam-appid`, `--macos-icon-sync`,
  `--fancy-dmg` now enable/disable without an argument
- `--enable-steam` → `--steam` / `--no-steam`
- `--enable-zip` → `--zip` / `--no-zip`
- `--enable-dmg` → `--dmg` / `--no-dmg`
- `--use-xcode-export` → `--xcode-export` / `--no-xcode-export`
- `--notarize yes|no` → `--notarize` / `--no-notarize`
- `NOTARIZE` env var drops `y`/`n` shorthands; only `yes`/`no` accepted
- Add CLAUDE.md with codebase guidance for Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* shift fix

* Fix missing shift in CLI parser and stale examples in CLAUDE.md

- Add missing `shift` to all new standalone boolean flag cases; without
  it the while loop never advanced past the flag (infinite loop / stall)
- Fix CLAUDE.md examples: --print-config and --dry-run no longer take
  a 0|1 argument

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
audit kmp roadmap AjuNk (#111)

* feat(audit): implement Tier-2 operational logging + audit log enhancements (TODO-004 Phase 1)

## Tier-2 Operational Logging Stack
- Add `OperationalLogRepository` interface (domain layer) with insert, paginated
  read, and retention-policy purge methods
- Add `OperationalLogRepositoryImpl` (data layer) mapping `operational_logs.sq`
  SQLDelight queries to domain model
- Add `KermitSqliteAdapter` (data layer) bridging Kermit `LogWriter` → SQLite via
  fire-and-forget coroutines; exceptions swallowed so logging never crashes the app
- Add `LogRetentionJob` (data layer) coroutine-based daily purge enforcing policy:
  VERBOSE/DEBUG 3d · INFO 14d · WARN 30d · ERROR/FATAL 90d
- Register `OperationalLogRepository`, `KermitSqliteAdapter`, `LogRetentionJob`
  in `DataModule` Koin bindings

## Brute-Force Detection
- Add `SecurityAuditLogger.isLoginBruteForced()`: queries `getRecentLoginFailureCount`
  and returns true if ≥5 failures within a 5-minute window
- Wire brute-force check in `AuthViewModel.onLoginClicked()`: shows dedicated
  "Too many failed attempts" message after threshold is exceeded

## Audit Log Viewer Enhancements (AuditLogScreen / AdminViewModel)
- Add `auditEventTypeFilter` and `auditSuccessFilter` fields to `AdminState`
- Add `FilterAuditByEventType`, `FilterAuditBySuccess`, `ExportAuditLogCsv` intents
- Add `ShareCsvExport` effect (carries RFC-4180 CSV content + suggested filename)
- Implement `exportAuditLogCsv()` in `AdminViewModel`: generates CSV of filtered
  entries with RFC-4180 quoting and emits `ShareCsvExport` effect
- Update client-side filter in `AuditLogScreen` to apply all three filter dimensions
- Add Material 3 `ExposedDropdownMenuBox` for event type (39 entries + "All")
- Add `FilterChip` row for success/fail 3-way toggle (All / OK / FAIL)
- Add CSV export `IconButton` (Download icon) in the filter toolbar

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* build(gradle): fix proxy nonProxyHosts + Clock import for LogRetentionJob

## Proxy fix (gradle.properties)
Sandboxed environments set JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS with *.google.com and
*.googleapis.com in nonProxyHosts, causing the JVM to bypass the proxy
for maven.google.com. Direct connections fail inside the sandbox, so
AGP and other Google Maven artifacts could not be resolved.

Added explicit nonProxyHosts override in org.gradle.jvmargs that removes
the *.google.com exclusion, routing maven.google.com through the Anthropic
egress proxy like all other Maven repos. Production CI (GitHub Actions)
does not use a proxy, so this change is a no-op in CI.

## Clock import fix (LogRetentionJob.kt)
Changed `import kotlinx.datetime.Clock` to `import kotlin.time.Clock` to
match the convention used by all other files in :shared:data. kotlinx-datetime
is not a direct dependency of :shared:data and Clock.System was not resolving
on the androidMain compilation target.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* fix(detekt): resolve all static analysis violations — zero warnings (Sprint C)

## config/detekt/detekt.yml
- Add `UnusedPrivateMember.ignoreAnnotated: [Preview]` — suppress all @Composable preview functions
- Add `ConstructorParameterNaming` + `FunctionParameterNaming` with `_?` prefix pattern
- Update `VariableNaming` + `TopLevelPropertyNaming` to allow `_` prefix for scaffold properties
- Add `UnusedParameter.ignoreAnnotated: [Composable]` — suppresses unused scaffold API params
- Add `UnusedPrivateProperty.excludes: [**/theme/**]` — ZyntaColors palette excluded
- Add `LongMethod.excludes: [**/navigation/**]` — NavGraph builder functions excluded
- Update `UnusedPrivateProperty.allowedNames` + `UnusedParameter.allowedNames` to `_.*` pattern

## Code fixes — unused private properties/parameters (rename to `_` prefix)
- shared/data: AccountRepositoryImpl, AccountingPeriodRepositoryImpl (_syncEnqueuer)
- shared/data: ReportRepositoryImpl (_dayStart, _dayEnd)
- shared/domain: CheckPermissionUseCase (_sessionFlow), CreateProductUseCase (_skuMatch)
- shared/domain: GenerateStockReportUseCase (_stockRepository)
- shared/domain: SeedDefaultChartOfAccountsUseCase (_storeId, _storeId in buildDefaultAccounts)
- shared/hal: Android/Desktop printer ports (_connectTimeoutMs, _vendorId, _productId)
- shared/hal: EscPosReceiptBuilder (_CMD_ALIGN_RIGHT), CloudPrntClient (_printerManager)
- shared/security: EncryptionManager android/jvm (_GCM_IV_LENGTH, _KEY_ENTRY_TYPE)
- shared/core: SystemHealthTracker.android (_dbSize)
- composeApp/auth: AuthViewModel (_logoutUseCase), CheckPermissionUseCase call site
- composeApp/inventory: InventoryViewModel (_searchProductsUseCase)
- composeApp/pos: PosViewModel (_orderId), SplitPaymentPanel (_amountInput)
- composeApp/navigation: MainNavGraph (_compactNavItems, _navGroups), call site in ZyntaNavGraph

## Code fixes — UseCheckOrError
- shared/core: Result.kt — throw IllegalStateException → error()
- shared/data: DatabaseKeyProvider.kt — error()
- composeApp/settings: JvmBackupService.kt, AndroidBackupService.kt — error()

## Code fixes — ThrowsCount
- shared/data: KtorApiService.safeRequest — @Suppress("ThrowsCount") + extracted mapHttpError helper

## Code fixes — MaxLineLength (150 char limit)
- shared/data: ExpenseRepositoryImpl.kt
- composeApp/settings: SettingsViewModel.kt (~20 lines), PosSettingsScreen.kt, SettingsHomeScreen.kt
- composeApp/designsystem: ZyntaSyncIndicator.kt, ZyntaProductCard.kt
- composeApp/accounting: ChartOfAccountsScreen, FinancialStatementsScreen, GeneralLedgerScreen, JournalEntryDetailScreen
- composeApp/customers: CustomerViewModel.kt
- composeApp/inventory: CategoryListScreen.kt, TaxGroupScreen.kt
- composeApp/pos: OrderHistoryScreen.kt
- composeApp/register: RegisterDashboardScreen.kt
- composeApp/reports: StockReportScreen.kt (@Suppress UnusedPrivateMember)

## Code fixes — other
- composeApp/designsystem: ZyntaNavigationDrawer (MayBeConst → const val)
- composeApp/designsystem: ZyntaSplitPane (_PrimaryMinWidth)
- composeApp/settings: SystemHealthScreen (DestructuringDeclarationWithTooManyEntries — 4→3)
- shared/data: DataModule.kt — update DI named args for renamed constructor params
- composeApp/feature/onboarding: OnboardingViewModel — update execute() named arg

Result: `./gradlew detekt --rerun-tasks` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL, zero violations
         `./gradlew :androidApp:assembleDebug :composeApp:jvmJar --parallel` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* feat(infra): implement TODO-007 backend infrastructure (Sprint D)

Adds complete Phase 2 backend infrastructure for ZyntaPOS:

Backend services (Ktor 3.4.1, CIO engine, Kotlin 2.3.0):
- backend/api/      REST API: auth (JWT RS256), sync push/pull, products
- backend/license/  License server: activate, heartbeat, status endpoints
- backend/sync/     WebSocket sync engine: real-time broadcast via SyncSessionManager

Security hardening (TODO-009 Level 1):
- Java deserialization blocked: System.setProperty("jdk.serialFilter", "!*")
  called at top of main() BEFORE embeddedServer starts in all 3 services
- CIO engine used throughout (no Netty JNI/off-heap CVEs)
- Security response headers: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options
- Docker: non-root zyntapos user, -Djdk.serialFilter=!* in JAVA_OPTS

Database:
- PostgreSQL 16 with HikariCP connection pooling
- Flyway migrations: V1 (schema), V2 (licenses + device_registrations)
- PostgreSQL tuning for Contabo VPS 10 (4 vCPU, 8 GB RAM, NVMe)

Docker Compose (production):
- All 6 services: caddy, api, license, sync, postgres, redis, canary
- Docker secrets for db_password, rs256_private_key, rs256_public_key
- Health checks on all services

Caddyfile:
- api/license/sync → real services; panel/docs/status → canary (Phase 3)
- Cloudflare Origin Certificate TLS for all subdomains
- WebSocket upgrade headers forwarded for sync.zyntapos.com

Scripts:
- scripts/backup.sh   daily pg_dump → Backblaze B2, 30-day retention
- scripts/setup-vps.sh  one-shot VPS provisioning (Docker, ufw, fail2ban)
- secrets/secrets.env.template  RSA key + DB password generation guide

Closes: TODO-007 Steps 6-10

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* feat(security): implement TODO-009 Levels 2-4 backend security hardening

Level 2 — Rate Limiting (per-IP, token-bucket):
  • api: configureRateLimit() — auth(10/min), api(300/min), sync(60/min)
    - Routing.kt: rateLimit zones wired to auth/product/sync route groups
  • license: configureRateLimit() — activate(5/10min) prevents key enumeration
  • sync: configureRateLimit() — ws(20/min) prevents WebSocket flood
    - Added ktor-server-rate-limit dep to sync/build.gradle.kts

Level 3 — Container Hardening (docker-compose.yml):
  • api, license, sync: read_only=true + tmpfs(/tmp:64m) + no-new-privileges
  • api: mem_limit=512m; license/sync: mem_limit=256m
  • postgres: no-new-privileges + mem_limit=1g
  • redis: no-new-privileges + mem_limit=512m

Level 4 — Dependency Security Scanning:
  • OWASP Dependency Check Gradle plugin (10.0.4) — all 3 backend services
    - failBuildOnCVSS=9.0 (CRITICAL only); owasp-suppressions.xml baseline
  • .github/workflows/sec-backend-scan.yml:
    - OWASP check per service + Trivy container image scan (matrix)
    - SARIF → GitHub Security Code Scanning alerts
    - Runs weekly (Monday 01:00 UTC) + on backend/ changes
  • .github/dependabot.yml:
    - Gradle updates: KMP root + api + license + sync (weekly, develop branch)
    - GitHub Actions updates (weekly)
    - kotlinx-datetime 0.6.1 pin preserved in ignore rules

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* fix(test): correct named argument mismatches in AuthViewModelTest and InventoryViewModelTest

AuthViewModelTest: logoutUseCase → _logoutUseCase (matches AuthViewModel constructor)
InventoryViewModelTest: searchProductsUseCase → _searchProductsUseCase (matches InventoryViewModel constructor)

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* docs(ci): add session handoff prompt for Phase 2 continuation

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* feat(infra): add VPS pre-flight check script (vps-check.sh)

13-section diagnostic script that verifies the full VPS config before
docker compose up. Checks: system resources, users/dirs, Docker, ufw,
fail2ban, secrets (RSA key pair match), .env, TLS certs, repo files,
rclone/cron, Docker service health, DNS resolution, and health endpoints.

Outputs colour-coded PASS/FAIL/WARN per item. Exits 0 only if all
hard requirements pass. Run on VPS as root or with sudo.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

* fix(deploy): build backend images in CI and pull from GHCR on VPS

Root cause: docker compose up --build on the VPS failed because
backend/*/gradlew and gradle/wrapper/ were missing from the repo
(either never added or git-ignored). VPS should never build from
source — CI builds Docker images and pushes to GHCR; VPS only pulls.

Changes:
- .gitignore: remove backend/*/gradle/ rule; add
  !backend/*/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar exception to allow
  the wrapper binary to be committed
- backend/{api,license,sync}/gradlew: add Gradle 8.14.3 wrapper
  (required by Dockerfile COPY steps and sec-backend-scan.yml
  ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze runs)
- backend/{api,license,sync}/gradle/wrapper/: add wrapper properties
  and JAR (same Gradle 8.14.3 as root project)
- ci-gate.yml: add build-backend-images matrix job (api/license/sync)
  that logs in to GHCR and pushes :latest + :<sha> tags after
  build-and-test succeeds; gate trigger-deploy on both jobs
- docker-compose.yml: replace build: blocks with image: references
  to ghcr.io/sendtodilanka/zyntapos-{api,license,sync}:latest
- cd-deploy.yml: add GHCR login (docker login ghcr.io) before
  docker compose pull; remove --build flag from docker compose up

VPS manual step required (not automated):
  echo "REDIS_PASSWORD=$(openssl rand -hex 24)" >> /opt/zyntapos/.env
  PAT_TOKEN must have read:packages scope for GHCR pull to succeed

https://claude.ai/code/session_0195xibztDGTtaHvqNKVstKz

commit.message:
fix: consolidate duplicate Organization schemas into single source in index.html

Two conflicting Organization schemas were rendering on the home page:
one in index.html (missing postalCode, foundingDate) and one in Home.tsx
(incomplete address, no sameAs). GSC reported validation warnings for both.

- index.html: upgrade to unified Organization schema with all fields:
  postalCode 243131, foundingDate 2008, full PostalAddress, sameAs,
  contactType lowercase, updated name to full legal entity name
- Home.tsx: remove redundant Organization/Manufacturer JSON_LD constant
  and its script tag entirely; keep only the ItemList schema

Organization schema now loads statically on every page via index.html,
requiring no JS execution — more reliable for Googlebot.

commit.message:
fix(bot): balanced corps assign defend not dig_in + calibration regression report

bot_brigade_ai_osid.ts Rule 6: balanced corps now assign 'defend' posture instead
of 'dig_in'. The dig_in movement lockout (commit acdd4b9) immobilizes brigades
that receive dig_in, causing RS balanced corps (after w20 doctrine transition) to
be stuck in place rather than repositioning. dig_in remains correct for defensive
corps (Rule 4 unchanged).

Calibration: n22=83.3% area-weighted (+0.1pp vs n21 baseline). The full −6.4pp
regression from the lockout commit requires broader investigation.

Operation Kupres pre-planned op investigated and deferred: forcing 2KK to offensive
stance permanently caused −6.7pp regression (n19=83.0%) due to force reallocation
disrupting Krajina/POSAVINA_NE defense. Organic bot + Kalesija overrides (n466
config) already capture kupres:kupres_2.

Docs: CALIBRATION_MASTER n468-n22 runs added; report in 40_reports/implemented/;
PROJECT_LEDGER + napkin updated; MEMORY.md calibration state updated.

commit.message:
Build CalAI — AI-powered calorie tracker with iOS-style UI

Full-stack Next.js app using Claude Vision API to analyze food photos
and automatically estimate nutritional content.

Features:
- Photo upload → Claude Vision API identifies food & estimates macros
- Meal review & edit before logging
- Dashboard with Recharts semicircle calorie gauge & macro bars
- History page with date navigation and gradient summary cards
- SQLite/Prisma persistence, local file uploads

Tech stack: Next.js 15 (App Router), Prisma + SQLite, Tailwind CSS v4,
Recharts, Anthropic SDK (claude-3-5-haiku), TypeScript

commit.message:
feat(CRM-009): 회원 등급 UI + 성능 최적화 + n8n 프록시 보안 + E2E 테스트

## 회원 등급 UI (CRM-010)
- Customers.tsx: 등급 배지 컬럼 추가, 등급 필터(ALL/5등급), staleTime 10분
- CustomerDetail.tsx: is_ambassador→AMBASSADOR 처리, 등급 변경 UI(Select+Textarea+useMutation)
- App.tsx: 전역 refetchOnWindowFocus:false, gcTime:30분 설정

## 성능 최적화 (CRM-011)
- React Query staleTime/gcTime/placeholderData 전체 적용
- devops-monitoring-expert 인덱스 가이드: SQLite 12개 인덱스 SQL 제공

## 보안 강화 (CRM-012)
- api.ts: NocoDB 직접 호출 → n8n WF-CRM-PROXY 프록시 방식으로 전환
- constants.ts: NocoDB Model ID 제거 → TABLE_NAMES 논리명만 유지
- WF-CRM-PROXY-nocodb-proxy.json: n8n 워크플로우 JSON 생성
- offline-crm/app.js: 하드코딩 토큰 제거 → 프록시 방식으로 전환

## E2E 테스트 (CRM-012)
- playwright.config.ts 설정
- tests/01-customers.spec.ts: 고객 조회 플로우 9개 테스트
- tests/02-invoices.spec.ts: 거래명세표 발행 10개 테스트
- tests/03-dashboard.spec.ts: 대시보드 KPI 9개 테스트

commit.message:
Remove bearer token login option from web UI

The login page no longer offers the "Use API token" mode. Bearer tokens
are still supported for programmatic/WebSocket auth but not exposed in
the login dialog. Removes unused AuthTokenDialog and setAuthToken.

translucent silver duct tape strips on left and right edges.
